name: Sour Soup with Rice Noodles
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Dried bamboo shoot tips (Soaked and shredded)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and soak mushrooms in warm water for 30 minutes; shred.
2. Wash and soak dried bamboo shoots in warm water for 1 hour; shred into 1-inch pieces.
3. Slice pork butt into 1-inch matchsticks.
4. Wash and trim green onion, shredding on the bias into 1-inch pieces.
5. Soak rice stick noodles in warm water until soft.
6. Heat broth in a saucepan.
7. When broth reaches gentle boil, add pork, mushrooms, bamboo shoots, soy sauce, and sugar; simmer for 10 minutes.
8. Add soaked rice stick noodles; simmer for another 10 minutes.
9. One minute before removing from heat, add vinegar and sesame oil; stir.
10. Remove to serving bowl; garnish with shredded green onions. Serve.
